tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"show firewall policy\nshow firewall address\nshow firewall service custom"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-TUNNEL-C2"
        set uuid 06bc3a46-32ab-51f1-b512-dd80146c1cb2
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "DNS-C2-203.0.113.1"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-8853"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "DENY-ALL-DNS-EGRESS"
        set uuid 1f2b5c38-32ab-51f1-74bc-9963652298e8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 4b93780e-2aaa-51f1-661c-400dbb1190b1
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 4b937f98-2aaa-51f1-ba50-9e269099a44c
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 4b9386a0-2aaa-51f1-3479-d72cd658c9ea
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 4b938b82-2aaa-51f1-9651-5c969472a928
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 4b93906e-2aaa-51f1-6ce0-e362e47da6e0
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 4b939532-2aaa-51f1-d740-402806da042b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 4b939a00-2aaa-51f1-57bc-c5df07b8957b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 4cc9d646-2aaa-51f1-f874-eaa5ad2f756b
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 4cc9d8ee-2aaa-51f1-48b3-d0af865bf9e3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 4cc9dd62-2aaa-51f1-2394-79a4d795a23f
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 4cca9c16-2aaa-51f1-9e6e-812d9da92f73
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 86c374ba-2aaa-51f1-9136-a3a9e06535af
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 86c6a2ca-2aaa-51f1-ea6e-ee47e9103dd9
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 929f02e0-2aaa-51f1-9434-6b57c1417ba1
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "DNS-C2-203.0.113.1"
        set uuid 06b65be4-32ab-51f1-9168-616c6b762a69
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"diagnose debug flow filter clear
diagnose debug flow filter saddr 192.168.1.3
diagnose debug flow filter daddr 203.0.113.1
diagnose debug flow filter port 8853
diagnose debug flow show console enable
diagnose debug enable
diagnose debug flow trace start 20"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
diagnose debug flow filter clear

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug flow filter saddr 192.168.1.3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug flow filter daddr 203.0.113.1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug flow filter port 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug flow show console enable

command parse error before 'console'
Command fail. Return code -61

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug flow trace start 20

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"diagnose debug flow trace stop\ndiagnose debug disable\nexecute ping 203.0.113.1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
diagnose debug flow trace stop

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # diagnose debug disable

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set service "DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #         set service "DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-TUNNEL-C2"
        set uuid 06bc3a46-32ab-51f1-b512-dd80146c1cb2
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "DNS-C2-203.0.113.1"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set name "DENY-ALL-DNS-EGRESS"
        set uuid 1f2b5c38-32ab-51f1-74bc-9963652298e8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end
